game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **地下城堡: 炼金术师的魔幻之旅:** 地下城堡: 炼金术师的魔幻之旅 is a dark-themed simulation and maze exploration game where players manage a castle, allocating limited population and artisan resources to craft diverse equipment and generate materials over time through idle mechanics. Players assemble and upgrade an adventure team, choosing from over 50 job types to customize their party's abilities and combat roles. The core loop involves sending the team into mazes, tapping to navigate nodes and uncover new map sections, encountering various challenges and collecting resources. Progression is achieved by successfully exploring deeper into mazes, which unlocks new resources, crafting recipes, and advanced job types for the adventure team.
game_info.description: Enter the depths of a mysterious underground castle as an alchemist. Manage your castle's resources, craft equipment using time-based alchemy, and assemble a team of adventurers to explore dangerous mazes. Navigate through interconnected nodes to uncover treasures and resources. Progress by delving deeper, unlocking new crafting recipes and powerful job classes. Balance resource management with strategic exploration to survive the depths.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate maze nodes, select options in menus
Space: Confirm selection, advance time (hold to speed up idle crafting)
Z: Switch between Castle Management and Maze Exploration modes
Shift: Quick-craft when in crafting menu (uses materials instantly)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game initialization and mode switching. Verifies that the game starts correctly, the castle management screen loads, and the player can switch between castle and maze modes using the Z key.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Start the game, wait a few frames for initialization. Press Z to switch between modes multiple times. Verify that gameState updates correctly and both modes are accessible.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game initializes without errors. Mode switching works smoothly. The gameState.currentMode alternates between "CASTLE" and "MAZE". Test is successful when both modes can be accessed and game remains stable.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic game initialization and mode switching. Verifies that the game starts correctly, the castle management screen loads, and the player can switch between castle and maze modes using the Z key.

TEST_1.expected: The game initializes without errors. Mode switching works smoothly. The gameState.currentMode alternates between "CASTLE" and "MAZE". Test is successful when both modes can be accessed and game remains stable.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete game loop: resource gathering, crafting, team building, and maze exploration leading to a win condition. This validates that all core mechanics work together and the game can be completed.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Accelerate time to gather resources. Craft basic equipment. Recruit adventurers with gathered materials. Enter maze mode and navigate optimally to reach the deepest level (level 5+). Collect treasures and return to win.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully progress through all game phases: resource accumulation, equipment crafting, team assembly, and maze exploration. Reach maze depth 5+ and trigger the win condition (GAME_OVER_WIN). Test succeeds when win screen displays with appropriate message.
TEST_2.description: Tests the complete game loop: resource gathering, crafting, team building, and maze exploration leading to a win condition. This validates that all core mechanics work together and the game can be completed.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests resource management and crafting mechanics. Validates that materials accumulate over time, crafting consumes the correct resources, and equipment is properly created and stored in inventory.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Hold Space to accelerate time and generate materials. Use Shift+Space to quick-craft items. Verify material counts decrease appropriately. Check that crafted items appear in inventory and can be equipped to adventurers.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Materials generate at expected rates. Crafting consumes correct amounts. Inventory updates properly. Equipment has appropriate stats. Test succeeds when multiple items are crafted without errors and inventory management works correctly.
TEST_3.description: Tests resource management and crafting mechanics. Validates that materials accumulate over time, crafting consumes the correct resources, and equipment is properly created and stored in inventory.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests maze navigation and node exploration mechanics. Verifies that the player can move through maze nodes, discover new areas, encounter challenges, and collect resources from exploration.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Enter maze mode. Use arrow keys to navigate between connected nodes. Explore all available paths. Interact with nodes to reveal new connections. Verify that fog of war clears appropriately and resources are collected.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Maze navigation is smooth and responsive. Nodes connect logically. New areas are revealed as explored. Resources and challenges appear at nodes. Test succeeds when player can fully explore at least one maze level without errors.
TEST_4.description: Tests maze navigation and node exploration mechanics. Verifies that the player can move through maze nodes, discover new areas, encounter challenges, and collect resources from exploration.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests team management and job system. Validates that adventurers can be recruited, assigned jobs, equipped with gear, and that their stats update correctly based on equipment and job type.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Gather resources and craft equipment. Recruit multiple adventurers. Assign different job types. Equip them with crafted items. Verify stat calculations. Check that team composition affects exploration success.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Adventurers are recruited successfully. Jobs can be assigned and changed. Equipment provides stat bonuses. Team stats display correctly. Test succeeds when a full party of 3-4 adventurers is assembled with varied jobs and equipment.
